Mortgage Application Complaints.description: Complaints about negative mortgage application decisions

subcategories.Not enough income: Customer contests a negative mortgage decision based on insufficient income
subcategories.Not enough transactions: Customer contests a negative mortgage decision based on insufficient transaction history
subcategories.Wrong / incomplete documents: Customer contests a negative mortgage decision caused by missing or incomplete documents

Other.description: Mortgage application complaints not fitting the main refusal reasons

subcategories.General Mortgage Application Complaint: General mortgage application issue not covered by specific refusal reasons
